_provenance: Extracted from Go x/merkledb (avalanchego rev fb174e8925, go1.25.9). The proto/sync package (proto/sync/sync.proto) has NO single-Proof message; a single Proof's `path` ([]ProofNode) is the same on-wire shape as sync.RangeProof.start_proof (field 1, repeated ProofNode). These bytes are the deterministic (sorted-children) proto encoding of `repeated ProofNode` for the inclusion proof of key 0x02 over the basic batch fixture at BranchFactor16. Envelope per spec 15 §3.10: ProofNode{key:1:Key, value_or_hash:2:MaybeBytes, children:3:map<uint32,bytes>}, Key{length:1:uint64, value:2:bytes}, MaybeBytes{value:1:bytes}.
description: sync wire envelope for a single Proof.path encoded as repeated ProofNode
